content-strategy: You are a senior social media strategist for a travel agency. Analyze trends and create a weekly content strategy targeting {{audience}}. Content mix: 60% inspirational travel imagery, 30% educational tips, 10% promotional offers. Output a day-by-day plan with platform, format, hook angle, and recommended hashtags.
image-photoreal: Photorealistic shot of {{scene}} at {{destination}}. Golden hour lighting, ultra-high resolution, travel photography, National Geographic quality. Shot on Sony A7R V, 24mm wide angle. No text, no watermarks.
image-carousel: Clean, modern travel infographic slide. Title: "{{title}}". Body: "{{body}}". Color palette: warm terracotta, cream, olive. Minimalist design. High readability, sans-serif typography. {{visual_element}} as background.
image-ugc: Authentic phone camera aesthetic of {{scene}} at {{destination}}. Natural lighting, slight motion blur, candid travel moment. Looks like a real traveler took this photo. Instagram Stories style.
caption-engagement: Write an engaging {{platform}} caption for a {{format}} about {{topic}} at {{destination}}. Hook must stop the scroll in 3 seconds. Use the '{{hook_formula}}' formula. Include 5-7 relevant hashtags. End with a clear CTA. Tone: {{tone}}. Max 150 characters for the hook.
hook-generator: Generate 5 viral hook lines for {{platform}} content about {{topic}} at {{destination}}. Use proven formulas: 'I wish I knew this before...', 'This vs That', 'POV: You are...', 'Stop doing X, do Y instead', 'The real reason...'. Each hook under 100 characters. Create immediate curiosity.
blog-longform: Write a comprehensive travel guide blog about {{topic}} at {{destination}}. Structure: 1. Hook/pain point, 2. What most people get wrong, 3. The insider solution with step-by-step breakdown, 4. What's included with checkmarks, 5. Who this is for/not for, 6. FAQ (4 questions), 7. Strong CTA. 1500-2500 words. Include optimized SEO title and meta description.
reel-script: Write a 15-30 second Reel/TikTok script for {{topic}} at {{destination}}. Format: Hook (0-3s) → Value (3-20s) → CTA (20-30s). Include text overlay timing, trending audio suggestion, and on-screen text. First 3 seconds MUST hook.
carousel-slides: Create a 10-slide Instagram carousel for {{topic}}. Each slide: bold headline + 2-3 bullet points + emoji. Slide 1 = stop-the-scroll hook. Slide 10 = CTA with link in bio. Tone: {{tone}}. Save-worthy content that people bookmark.
email-nurture: Write nurture email #{{step}} for a travel lead. Lead name: {{name}}. Source: {{source}}. Goal: {{goal}}. Tone: warm, personal, insider knowledge. Keep under 200 words. Include one insider tip. CTA: {{cta}}.
trend-analysis: Analyze travel trend data from {{platform}}. Identify: 1) Top 5 trending destinations, 2) Viral hook structures, 3) Rising hashtags, 4) Content gaps, 5) 5 original content briefs based on patterns. Output as structured JSON.
hashtag-strategy: Generate optimal hashtag set for a {{platform}} {{format}} about {{topic}} at {{destination}}. Include: 3 high-volume (100k+ posts), 5 mid-volume (10k-100k), 5 niche (under 10k), 2 trending. Total 15-20. Mix of English and local language.
